source_url: 谈论vitamind，注意提到它无法从食物中获取（原因？），以及人们的缺乏，还有它对于健康的重要性，多方面：免疫系统、皮肤、骨骼等其他健康方面
english_script:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 23 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I watched a video about vitamin D. It talked about why we need it and why we don't get enough. The video said vitamin D is very special. Most vitamins come from food. But vitamin D is different. We cannot get enough from food alone. Our bodies make it when our skin gets sunlight. That is why it is called the sunshine vitamin.

Many people do not have enough vitamin D. The video said about one billion people worldwide have low levels. That is a lot of people. Why is this happening? One reason is that we spend more time inside. We work in offices and stay at home. Another reason is that we use sunscreen. Sunscreen protects our skin but stops vitamin D production. Also, people in cold countries get less sunlight in winter.

Vitamin D is very important for our health. First, it helps our immune system. It fights off germs and keeps us from getting sick. Second, it is good for our bones. It helps our body use calcium. Without enough vitamin D, bones can become weak and break easily. Third, it is good for our skin. It helps skin cells grow and repair. Some studies also say it helps our mood. It may reduce feelings of sadness.

From this I learned that vitamin D is not just a simple vitamin. It is a key part of our health. We need to get some sunlight every day. But not too much. Ten to fifteen minutes of sun on our arms and face is enough. In winter, we may need to take a supplement. Also, some foods have a little vitamin D. Fatty fish like salmon have some. Eggs and milk also have a little. But food alone is not enough.

So I learned that I should try to go outside more. Even a short walk in the sun can help. This is a simple way to stay healthy. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation:
大家好，我是Lulu。每天练习英语的第23天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我看了一个关于维生素D的视频。它谈到了为什么我们需要它以及为什么我们摄入不足。视频说维生素D非常特别。大多数维生素来自食物。但维生素D不同。我们无法仅从食物中获得足够的量。我们的身体在皮肤接触阳光时会产生它。这就是为什么它被称为阳光维生素。

很多人缺乏维生素D。视频说全球约有十亿人水平较低。这人数很多。为什么会这样？一个原因是我们待在室内的时间更多了。我们在办公室工作，待在家里。另一个原因是我们使用防晒霜。防晒霜保护皮肤但阻止了维生素D的产生。此外，寒冷国家的人们在冬天获得的阳光更少。

维生素D对我们的健康非常重要。首先，它帮助免疫系统。它对抗病菌，防止我们生病。第二，它对骨骼好。它帮助身体利用钙。没有足够的维生素D，骨骼会变弱，容易骨折。第三，它对皮肤好。它帮助皮肤细胞生长和修复。一些研究还说它有助于情绪。它可能减少悲伤感。

从中我学到维生素D不仅仅是一种简单的维生素。它是我们健康的关键部分。我们需要每天获得一些阳光。但不要太多。在手臂和脸上晒十到十五分钟就够了。冬天，我们可能需要服用补充剂。此外，一些食物含有少量维生素D。像鲑鱼这样的多脂鱼有一些。鸡蛋和牛奶也有一点。但仅靠食物是不够的。

所以我学到了我应该多出去走走。即使在阳光下短距离散步也有帮助。这是保持健康的简单方法。谢谢聆听，明天见。
concise_english:
Hi guys, it's Lulu. Day 23 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English.

Today I learned about vitamin D. It is different from other vitamins. We cannot get enough from food. Our skin makes it from sunlight. That is why it is called the sunshine vitamin.

Many people do not have enough vitamin D. We spend too much time inside. We use sunscreen. In winter, there is less sun. So levels go down.

Vitamin D is very important. It helps our immune system. It keeps our bones strong. It is good for our skin. It may also help our mood.

From this I learned that a little sun every day is good. Ten minutes is enough. In winter, we may need a supplement. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
concise_chinese:
大家好，我是Lulu。每天练习英语的第23天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。

今天我了解了维生素D。它与其他维生素不同。我们无法从食物中获取足够量。我们的皮肤通过阳光制造它。这就是为什么它被称为阳光维生素。

很多人缺乏维生素D。我们待在室内时间太多。我们使用防晒霜。冬天阳光更少。所以水平下降。

维生素D非常重要。它帮助免疫系统。它保持骨骼强壮。它对皮肤好。它也可能帮助情绪。

从中我学到每天晒一点太阳有好处。十分钟就够了。冬天，我们可能需要补充剂。谢谢聆听，明天见。
